summary: Both REQ-13 and REQ-14 appear to be fully implemented in the diff. The About.tsx component was modified to include the stall/owner photo with rounded corners, warm brown/gold gradient frame, shadow, responsive sizing, generous whitespace, and a figcaption. The 'Our Story' heading was restyled with the 'text-luxury-3d' CSS class (multi-layer warm brown/gold text-shadow defined in index.css) and a decorative gold rule ornament beneath it.
